name: Chicken Satay
recipeIngredient: 1 pound chicken breasts or thighs, deboned and skinned
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut chicken into strips.
2. Combine marinade ingredients in a bowl. Add chicken and chill covered for at least 30 minutes or more.
3. Soak bamboo skewers in water for at least 30 minutes before threading the chicken onto them.
4. Grill the chicken until it is golden brown. Serve with Peanut Sauce and Thai Cucumber Salad (see recipes).
